name: Amazon Pay Credit Card

rewards.displayCategory: E-books, gift cards, bill payments, recharges, and Amazon Pay loading

exclusions: EMI transactions including EMI on call
additionalBenefits: Earnings are auto-credited as Amazon Pay balance within 2 working days of billing cycle completion
1% fuel surcharge waiver across all fuel purchases
Low forex mark-up of 1.99% on international spends
additionalDetails: No expiry on earnings credited as Amazon Pay balance.

salaried: Indian citizen aged 21 years or above
Monthly income of at least Rs 20,000
selfEmployed: Indian citizen aged 21 years or above
Monthly income of at least Rs 30,000

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
Amazon Prime members earn 5% cashback on Amazon.in purchases; non-Prime cardholders earn 3%, excluding Gold Coins and travel bookings for flights and hotels via Amazon Pay.
E-books, gift cards, Amazon Pay money loading and auto reloading, bill payments, mobile recharges, and DTH recharges earn 2% cashback irrespective of Prime status.
Cashback is credited as Amazon Pay balance to the Amazon account used while applying for the card within 2 working days of billing cycle completion.
With effect from Oct 11, 2025, education and international transactions do not earn rewards.
With effect from Oct 11, 2025, utility transactions outside the Amazon platform do not earn rewards.
With effect from Jun 18, 2024, rent transactions do not earn rewards.
EMI transactions, EMI on call, cash transactions, fees, and interest do not earn rewards; if a transaction is converted to EMI later, rewards are clawed back.
An add-on card can be applied for through iMobile app or Net Banking.
